name: kg-suite-multi-vertical-conformance
description: Runs any KG Suite artifact through all 10 verticals' verification heuristics in one pass. Surfaces the per-vertical compliance posture matrix — applicable / not-applicable / partial / failed — for buyer-side procurement reviewers evaluating multi-vertical SaaS vendors (e.g., one tool touching HealthTech + FinTech + EdTech data).
